line.token: * FrontHelper class will be useful for theme functionality
* to retrieves particular content needed on theme layout
SELECT p.ID, p.media_id, p.post_author, p.post_date, p.post_modified, p.post_title, p.post_slug,
LEFT JOIN tbl_media m ON p.media_id = m.ID
LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON p.post_author = u.ID
SELECT ID, topic_title, topic_slug FROM tbl_topics WHERE topic_status = 'Y' AND ID = '
"SELECT YEAR(tbl_posts.post_date) AS year_archive, MONTH(tbl_posts.post_date) AS month_archive
FROM tbl_posts WHERE tbl_posts.post_type = 'blog' AND tbl_posts.post_status = 'publish'
ORDER BY YEAR(tbl_posts.post_date) DESC, MONTH(tbl_posts.post_date) DESC"
SELECT p.ID, p.media_id, p.post_author, p.post_date, p.post_modified, p.post_title, p.post_slug,
p.post_type, p.comment_status, m.ID, m.media_filename, m.media_caption, m.media_access,
LEFT JOIN tbl_media AS m ON p.media_id = m.ID
LEFT JOIN tbl_users AS u ON p.post_author = u.ID
* implementing a simple MySQL full-text searching
// First check if $tag is valid - if empty, return empty array
// If database functions aren't available, return a placeholder result
// The template will handle the "no posts" display
// Return a minimal placeholder so page can render
SELECT ID, post_title, post_content, post_summary, post_tags FROM tbl_posts WHERE post_tags LIKE '
// Return a minimal placeholder so page can render
'SELECT DISTINCT LOWER(post_tags) AS postTags FROM tbl_posts WHERE post_tags != "" GROUP BY postTags'
YEAR(p.post_date) AS year_archive, MONTH(p.post_date) AS month_archive,
LEFT JOIN tbl_media AS m ON p.media_id = m.ID
LEFT JOIN tbl_users AS u ON p.post_author = u.ID
m.ID, m.media_filename, m.media_caption, m.media_access, u.ID, u.user_fullname
LEFT JOIN tbl_media AS m ON p.media_id = m.ID
LEFT JOIN tbl_users AS u ON p.post_author = u.ID
"SELECT ID, topic_title, topic_slug FROM tbl_topics WHERE topic_slug = ? AND topic_status = 'Y'"
"SELECT ID, topic_title, topic_slug FROM tbl_topics WHERE ID = ? AND topic_status = 'Y'"
LEFT JOIN tbl_users AS u ON p.post_author = u.ID
LEFT JOIN tbl_media AS m ON p.media_id = m.ID
"SELECT ID, media_filename, media_caption FROM tbl_media WHERE media_target = 'gallery' ORDER BY ID LIMIT ?, ?"
